nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: 圭亚那
nodes.summary: 圭亚那是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联285种鸟类，包括灰䳍、灰腿穴䳍、红脚穴䳍等285种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: NT

nodes.name: Grey-bellied hawk
nodes.summary: Grey-bellied hawk（Grey-bellied hawk，学名 Accipiter poliogaster），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，已关联10个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括森林砍伐、人类活动扰动。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The forest habitat of this hawk species is primarily threatened by increased deforestation in the Amazon Basin;Bird JP, Buchanan, JM, Lees, AC, Clay, RP, Develey, PF, Yépez I, Butchart, SHM

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: However, it does appear somewhat tolerant of habitat disturbance since it has been observed foraging and nesting in degraded habitat. Nevertheless, the population is projected to decline because of the species susceptibility to being hunted and trapped; and habitat disturbance may more likely negatively affect the population. Its rarity may also be partly attributable to competition with Micrastur forest falcons
